productDisplayName: Puma Unisex White Speeder Sports Shoes
description: Round toed white shoes with central lace upsSynthetic upper with overlays, green form stripes along the side of the shoe, branding on the tongue, in the midfoot region and heel collar, reinforced overlay at the heel collarPadded inner and tongue with a cushioned footbedDouble layered rubber midsoleRubber outsole with nubs, extends at the heel region and has pivot points all over the forefoot region for easy movementWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defects
